summary: Tested bug fixes for Lebanese accounting system: (1) Print template cleanup - Unit/وحدة column removed, now has 8 columns, (2) Box/Package field persistence - fields now persist on invoice save. All 5 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Box, Pkg, Qty columns visible in invoice form.

minor.issue: Console error 'response.data.filter is not a function' when fetching sales accounts with empty data. Frontend may expect array but API returns empty array correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: 1. NO 'Unit/وحدة' column found - column removed as required
2. Header has exactly 8 columns: #, Item, Box, Pkg, Qty, Price, Disc, Total
1. SalesInvoiceLineItem (line 321-342) has: box: Optional[float], package: Optional[float], pack_description: Optional[str]
2. SalesReturnLineItem (line 885-902) has: box: Optional[float], package: Optional[float], pack_description: Optional[str]
1. Create invoice with box=5.0, package=12.0, pack_description='12 pieces per box' - fields persist
2. GET invoice - box/package/pack_description fields returned correctly
3. Update invoice with changed box/package values - changes persist
1. Sales Invoice form has Box, Pkg, Qty columns visible
2. Invoice creation modal shows all required fields
seed_data_creation: Created test customer account (41110001) and sales account (71010001) for API testing. Test invoices created and deleted during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Box/Package persistence bug fix verified. Both SalesInvoiceLineItem and SalesReturnLineItem schemas now include box, package, pack_description fields. Print template has 8 columns (Unit column removed). Test accounts were created during testing: customer 41110001, sales 71010001.

print_template_no_unit_column.details: Verified print template does NOT contain 'Unit' or 'وحدة' text. Column has been removed.

print_template_8_columns.details: Print template header has exactly 8 columns: #, Item, Box, Pkg, Qty, Price, Disc, Total

empty_rows_8_td.details: Empty rows in print template have exactly 8 <td> elements

box_package_fields_in_schema.details: SalesInvoiceLineItem schema has box: Optional[float], package: Optional[float], pack_description: Optional[str]

sales_return_line_item_schema.details: SalesReturnLineItem schema has box: Optional[float], package: Optional[float], pack_description: Optional[str]

create_invoice_persists_box_package.details: Creating invoice with box=5.0, package=12.0 - fields persist in create response and when fetched via GET

update_invoice_preserves_box_package.details: Updating invoice with new box/package values - changes are persisted correctly

frontend_ui_has_box_pkg_columns.details: Sales Invoice form UI has Box, Pkg, Qty columns visible in line items table
